requirements.description: Master installer script (install-gsd-all.ps1) must run all patch scripts in the correct dependency order.
requirements.notes: File exists; installs 36+ scripts in chain order

requirements.description: Global installation directory (~/.gsd-global) must be created with bin/, config/, lib/modules/, prompts/, scripts/, supervisor/ subdirectories.
requirements.notes: install-gsd-global.ps1 exists and sets up global dir

requirements.description: Per-project .gsd/ folder must be initialized with health/, code-review/, generation-queue/, agent-handoff/, research/, specs/, assessment/, blueprint/, costs/, logs/, supervisor/ subdirectories.
requirements.notes: setup-gsd-convergence.ps1 exists; .gsd/ dirs present in repo

requirements.description: Convergence loop must implement a 5-phase cycle: code-review, research, plan, execute, and stall/regression checks.
requirements.notes: convergence-loop.ps1 exists with all 5 phases documented

requirements.description: Blueprint pipeline must implement a 3-phase cycle: blueprint (one-time), build, and verify.
requirements.notes: Blueprint pipeline script exists and is in install chain

requirements.description: Resilience module must support retry with batch reduction, checkpoint/resume, lock file management, and health regression protection.
requirements.notes: patch-gsd-resilience.ps1 exists; constants RETRY_MAX, BATCH_REDUCTION_FACTOR, LOCK_STALE_MINUTES defined

requirements.description: Hardening patch must add quota/rate limit handling, network failure detection, boundary enforcement, push notifications, and heartbeat.

Final validation gate must run 10 checks (dotnet build, npm build, dotnet test, npm test, SQL validation, dotnet audit, npm audit, DB completeness, security compliance, runtime smoke test) when health reaches 100%.
Developer handoff document (developer-handoff.md) must be generated at pipeline exit with build, DB, env, requirements, validation, issues, health, costs, council findings, and LOC sections.
requirements.notes: New-DeveloperHandoff function appended by this script

requirements.description: LLM Council must support 6 council types: convergence, post-research, pre-execute, post-blueprint, stall-diagnosis, post-spec-fix.
Parallel sub-task execution must split execute batch into independent sub-tasks and distribute round-robin across codex/claude/gemini.
Resilience hardening must track token costs on all attempts, fix auth error regex, cap cumulative quota wait at 120 min, and rotate agent after 1 consecutive quota failure.
Quality gates must include DB completeness (API->SP->Table->Seed chain), security compliance (OWASP regex scan), and spec quality gate (clarity scoring + cross-artifact consistency).
requirements.notes: patch-gsd-quality-gates.ps1 exists with Test-DatabaseCompleteness, Test-SecurityCompliance, Invoke-SpecQualityGate

requirements.description: Multi-model integration must add 4 REST API agents (Kimi K2.5, DeepSeek V3, GLM-5, MiniMax M2.5) via model-registry.json and OpenAI-compatible REST adapter.
Self-healing supervisor must implement 3-layer recovery (L1 pattern match, L2 AI diagnosis, L3 AI fix) with max 5 attempts, pattern memory, and escalation report.
Differential code review must use git diff to limit review scope to changed files only, with Save-ReviewedCommit and fallback thresholds.
Pre-execute compile gate must build the project before committing generated code, with fix attempts via fix-compile-errors.md prompt.
Per-requirement acceptance tests must support 5 test types: file_exists, pattern_match, build_check, dotnet_test, npm_test.
Contract-first API validation must verify route coverage, HTTP methods, parameter types, [Authorize], inline SQL absence, and SP mapping against 06-api-contracts.md.
Visual validation must use Playwright screenshot capture with Figma export comparison and pixel diff threshold.
Design token enforcement must detect hardcoded CSS values (colors, fonts, spacing, borders) and enforce design token usage.
Compliance engine must run per-iteration SEC-*/COMP-* audit (20+ rules), DB migration validation, and PII flow tracking.
Speed optimizations must include conditional research skip, smart batch sizing, and prompt template deduplication via {{SECURITY_STANDARDS}} and {{CODING_CONVENTIONS}} variables.
Agent intelligence must implement performance scoring (Update-AgentPerformanceScore) and warm-start pattern sharing (Save-ProjectPatterns) across projects.
LOC tracking must measure lines added/removed per iteration via git diff --numstat, calculate cost-per-line, and integrate metrics into ntfy notifications.
Runtime smoke test must validate DI container, check API endpoints for 500 errors, and verify FK seed order.
Partitioned code review must run 3-way parallel review with agent rotation (spec validation + Figma validation + code review).
LOC-cost integration must surface running cost-per-line in every ntfy notification and include enhanced LOC tracking with grand totals.
Maintenance mode must provide gsd-fix (bug fix via text/file/directory), gsd-update (incremental feature from updated specs), --Scope filter, and --Incremental flag.
Council requirements verification must run 3-agent parallel extraction (each processes 1/3 of specs), cross-verification, and Claude synthesis, exposed as gsd-verify-requirements command.
Auto-decompose partial requirements must split stuck partials into 2-4 atomic sub-requirements at the start of each plan phase.
Token cost calculator must support 10 models with dynamic pricing from LiteLLM GitHub database (14-day cache), client quoting with 3-tier pricing, and -ShowComparison mode.
Multi-interface detection (interfaces.ps1) must support 7 interface types: web, api, database, mcp, browser, mobile, agent with auto-detection fallback.
Spec consistency checker must detect contradictions between specification documents and block the pipeline when clarity score is below 70.
Spec conflict auto-resolution via Gemini must resolve contradictions between spec files and output a resolved spec.
False convergence fix must prevent the pipeline from exiting early when health appears at 100% but requirements are incomplete.
gsd-assess command must scan codebase, detect interfaces, generate file map, and classify work items (skip/refactor/extend/build).
requirements.notes: gsd-assess implemented via patch-gsd-partial-repo.ps1 and final-patch-6-assess-limitations.ps1

requirements.description: VS Code keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+Shift+G chord) must be installed for convergence loop, blueprint pipeline, and status dashboard.
API key setup script must support Set/Show/Clear modes for ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, GOOGLE_API_KEY, KIMI_API_KEY, DEEPSEEK_API_KEY, GLM_API_KEY, MINIMAX_API_KEY.

Model version pinning must enforce --model flag on all CLI invocations using $script:CLAUDE_MODEL, $script:GEMINI_MODEL, $script:CODEX_MODEL constants, configurable via agent_models in global-config.json.
requirements.notes: Documented in v2.3.0 changes; convergence-loop.ps1 exists but model constants depend on resilience.ps1 (runtime file)

requirements.description: Developer guide document (GSD-Developer-Guide.md) must exist as a comprehensive reference covering all 20+ chapters including installation, usage, architecture, coding standards, compliance, and all installed scripts.
Developer guide must be generated as a Word .docx file via python-docx or pandoc conversion, with generate-docx.py script provided.
Developer guide must include document history table with version entries for each major release from 1.0.0 through latest (currently 2.3.0).
requirements.notes: Document history table present with entries 1.0.0 through 2.3.0

requirements.description: Developer guide must document all prompt template files for each agent role (claude/, codex/, gemini/, council/, shared/) in an appendix.
requirements.notes: Guide lists prompt templates but full appendix table not confirmed

requirements.description: Developer guide must include Appendix F with ALL $script: constants from resilience.ps1 with actual values (not placeholders).
requirements.notes: Constants documented inline in chapters but dedicated appendix table completeness not confirmed

requirements.description: Troubleshooting guide must cover installation issues (execution policy, missing CLIs, partial install recovery).
requirements.notes: Troubleshooting guide exists with install, API key, runtime, stall, and spec issues

requirements.description: Troubleshooting guide must cover API key issues including terminal restart requirement and environment variable persistence.
requirements.notes: API key section present in troubleshooting guide

requirements.description: Troubleshooting guide must cover runtime issues including stale lock files, quota exhaustion, network failures, health regression, and agent stalls.
requirements.notes: Runtime issues section covers these topics

requirements.description: Troubleshooting guide must cover spec consistency conflict issues and the spec quality gate blocking behavior.
requirements.notes: Spec gate and conflict resolution topics documented

requirements.description: Troubleshooting guide must cover quality gate failures for DB completeness, security compliance, and spec validation.
Troubleshooting guide must cover token calculator issues including pricing cache staleness and LiteLLM database failures.
requirements.notes: Token calculator section present in troubleshooting guide

requirements.description: Storyboard-aware verification must use verify-storyboard.md prompt for data flow tracing across screens.
SQL CLI validation must be added to final validation gate to verify SQL syntax during pipeline completion.
Partial repo handling must enable gsd-assess to work on repositories with existing code, classifying files as skip/refactor/extend/build.
Developer guide must document gsd-remote command for remote monitoring with QR code and ntfy.sh push notification setup.
requirements.notes: gsd-remote documented in command table and monitoring section

requirements.description: Figma Make integration must discover 12 deliverables in _analysis/ and 3 stubs in _stubs/ per interface.
ImageMagick visual diff must use three-tier comparison: SHA256 hash, pixel diff, and file-size fallback.
requirements.notes: Documented in v2.3.0 changes; visual validation script exists

requirements.description: HSL/oklch/hwb CSS color formats must be detected by design token enforcement in addition to hex and rgb.
Incremental file map must use threshold-based cache strategy: prune cache for <=20 changed files, full rebuild for >20 files.
Per-project supervisor pattern memory must be maintained separately from global cross-project pattern memory.
requirements.notes: Documented in v2.3.0 changes; supervisor script exists
